descriptionShort: Richmond Sockeyes defeat Humboldt Broncos 4-3 in Centennial Cup playoff overtime.
descriptionLong: Tony Bobbitt scored the overtime winner at 1:04 of a 10-minute OT period to give the Richmond Sockeyes a 4-3 victory over the Humboldt Broncos in a Centennial Cup junior hockey playoff game. The game took place in Humboldt, Saskatchewan on Wednesday, April 23, 1987.
